case_title: JUANA LORENA HERNANDEZ VS. DANIEL S HOSHIYAWA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-19-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOSHIYAWA, DANIEL S
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M.S. SCOTT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
